context: Signals & crossover test sessiyasi natijalari va keyingi mantiq-blok tavsiyalari. 16 yangi test: users/signals.py (profil/avatar/reyting), drama/signals.py (katalog kesh, trending, FTS m2m guard), crossover (_queue_next_episode fasl/VIP/50% chegaralari, continue_watching ko'p-serial dedup). Jami: 433 birlik + 7 e2e passed, ruff toza. Tavsiyalar mavjud infratuzilmaga tayanadi: Celery on_commit naqshi, Telegram-push (V2A-T2), FTS+pg_trgm (P8-T1), wallet servisi, versiyalangan kesh (P9-T1).

qamrov: users/signals: profil auto-create idempotent; avatar eski-fayl tozalash (default.jpg guard delete-spy bilan, storage-xato yutilishi, profil-delete tozalash, o'zgarmagan-save daxlsiz); reyting post_delete tomoni 0/0

drama/signals: katalog kesh post_delete bump; yengil modellar (Genre/Category) bump; trending faqat Movie|Tag (Genre'da yo'q); actors m2m forward-only guard (reverse'da Actor.pk Movie deb ketmasin); tags post_clear

crossover: fasl chegarasi S1->S2 (episode_number davomiyligi); VIP-qulf keyingi qism navbatga TUSHADI (hujjatlashtirilgan: navbat != ruxsat, gate playback'da); completed bo'lmasa navbat yo'q; continue_watching har serialdan bitta + deterministik tartib

recommendations.nima_uchun: continue_watching selector va Telegram-push infra (V2A-T2) allaqachon bor — eng arzon retention dastagi. 48 soat harakatsiz chala progress bor userlarga bitta digest eslatma.
recommendations.qanday: Celery beat task: WatchProgress(completed=False, updated_at<now-48h) userlari -> har userga BITTA xabar (oxirgi 3 serial nomi bilan); Profile'da opt-out flag; rate_limit mavjud naqshda; idempotentlik uchun 'oxirgi eslatma' timestamp.

recommendations.nima_uchun: Yangi test hujjatlashtirdi: VIP-qulf keyingi qism ham navbatga tushadi. Kabinetda bu karta bosilganda user gate'ga uriladi — kutilmagan to'siq o'rniga oldindan VIP badge + 'VIP oching' CTA ko'rsatish konversiyani oshiradi.
recommendations.qanday: continue_watching selector'ga is_vip_locked annotate (episode_number > FREE_LIMIT va movie.is_vip va user obunasiz); template'da badge; playback gate O'ZGARMAYDI.

recommendations.nima_uchun: similar_movies (tag-moslik) allaqachon bor, lekin faqat kino sahifasida. Ko'rish tarixiga asoslangan bosh-sahifa lentasi retention'ning ikkinchi ustuni.
recommendations.qanday: drama/services/recommendations.py: oxirgi N ko'rilgan kinoning tag/janr to'plami -> vazn bo'yicha kesishma, ko'rilganlar exclude; natija versiyalangan keshda (catalog:v naqshi); sovuq-start: trending fallback. Keyin bosqich-2: birgalikda-ko'rish (collaborative) signali.

recommendations.nima_uchun: FTS (P8-T1) va pg_trgm testlari allaqachon repoda — foydalanuvchi ko'rinadigan qismi (jonli taklif, 'balki ...ni nazarda tutdingizmi') yo'q.
recommendations.qanday: GET /search/suggest?q= endpoint: prefix match (istartswith, kesh 5 min) + natija kam bo'lsa similarity() trigram fallback; frontend: mavjud htmx bilan debounce input.

recommendations.nima_uchun: V2F-T1 (Click) boshlanishidan OLDIN to'lov holat-mashinasini bitta joyga birlashtirish arzon; keyin ikkita provayder bilan qimmatlashadi. Webhook o'tkazib yuborilgan/ikki marta kelgan holatlar uchun himoya hozir minimal.
recommendations.qanday: payments holat-mashinasi (pending/paid/failed/expired) + Celery beat 'pending > 30min' skanlovchi (provayder status API bilan solishtiradi) + admin qo'lda-solishtirish action; barcha coin-yozuvlar wallet servisi orqali (invariant saqlanadi).

recommendations.nima_uchun: Wallet servisi yagona kirish nuqtasi sifatida tayyor; kunlik qaytish odatini mustahkamlaydi (short-drama auditoriyasi uchun klassik mexanika).
recommendations.qanday: users/services/streak.py: kunlik birinchi ko'rishda (WatchProgress yaratilish signali allaqachon bor joyga minimal hook) DailyVisit(user, date unique) qator + streak hisob; 7-kun bonus wallet.credit orqali; abuse-guard: unique constraint + server sana.
recommendations.bogliq: wallet invarianti; eco V3B-T7 streak tajribasi

recommendations.nima_uchun: pre_save signalida sinxron storage.exists()+delete() — GCS'da bu request ichida 2 ta tarmoq so'rovi (profil saqlashni sekinlashtiradi). Endi signal to'plami to'liq testlangan — xavfsiz refaktor mumkin.
recommendations.qanday: Signal faqat eski nomni aniqlaydi -> transaction.on_commit(delete_storage_file_task.delay(name)) (retry 3x, topilmasa jim); default.jpg guard testlari saqlanadi (xatti-harakat o'zgarmaydi).

recommendations.nima_uchun: WatchProgress'da funnel-ma'lumot yotibdi (qaysi serial nechanchi qismda tashlab ketiladi) — kontent xarid/ishlab chiqarish qarorlari uchun to'g'ridan-to'g'ri signal.
recommendations.qanday: Beat task (kunlik): per-serial qism-N completion foizi -> AnalyticsSnapshot jadvali; unfold admin sahifa (grafik + CSV eksport); og'ir aggregatsiya faqat fonda (recompute_* naqshi).

recommendations.nima_uchun: REC-01/03/06 kabi yangi mexanikalarni foizli/guruhli yoqish uchun; hozir hamma narsa hamma userga birdan chiqadi.
recommendations.qanday: core/flags.py: kesh-backed FeatureFlag(name, enabled, percent) + template tag + user-hash foiz bo'lish (eco V3G-T4 dizayni ko'chiriladi).

recommendations.sarlavha: GDPR: ma'lumot eksporti + hisob o'chirishda anonimlash
recommendations.nima_uchun: Izohlar/reyting/ko'rish tarixi yig'ilmoqda; O'zbekiston shaxsiy ma'lumotlar qonuni + kelajak app-store talablari uchun ham kerak bo'ladi.
recommendations.qanday: Eksport: Celery task JSON arxiv -> email havola (eco V2G-T3 naqshi); o'chirish: kontent sentinel-muallifga anonimlanadi, WatchProgress/PII o'chadi; avatar-delete signali (endi testlangan) qayta ishlatiladi.
